featured.mvp_subtitle: The character with the most rostered run appearances.
featured.host_success_subtitle: Highest weighted performance score among completed hosted runs.

raid_leaders.title: Raid Leaders
raid_leaders.subtitle: Most runs marked as raid leader.

host_success.title: Host Performance
host_success.subtitle: Completed hosted runs ranked by weighted success and Bayesian smoothing. Hosts need at least two completed hosted runs to appear.
host_success.formula_hint: Score = (documented successes + auto-successes x 0.5 + prior) / (completed hosted runs + 10). One-run hosts are hidden.

empty.overall: Rostered participants will appear here once runs have assigned slots.
empty.raid_leaders: Raid leader rankings appear once roster slots are marked as raid leader.
empty.hosts: Host rankings appear once roster slots are marked as host.
empty.host_success: Host success appears after completed hosted runs exist.
